Education Ph.D. Ecology and Evolutionary Biology, Yale University Thesis – Evolutionary origin of cell types: a case study of decidual cells in mammalian pregnancy Adviser – Dr. Gunter P. Wagner 2012–18 M.Sc. Biology, Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) Thesis – Allelic variation in yeast: its role in cis-regulatory adaptation and its pleiotropic consequences Adviser – Dr. Himanshu Sinha 2009–12 B.

item.title: Publications
item.author: arun.chavan@yale.edu (Arun Chavan)
item.description: Google Scholar | ResearchGate | ORCiD Endometrial recognition of pregnancy occurs in the grey short-tailed opossum (Monodelphis domestica). Griffith OW, Chavan AR, Pavlicev M, Protopapas S, Callahan R, Maziarz J, Wagner GP (2019) Proc. R. Soc. B 286: 20190691 | pdf Evolution of embryo implantation was enabled by the origin of decidual cells in eutherian mammals. Chavan AR, Griffith OW, Stadtmauer D, Maziarz JD, Pavlicev M, Fishman R, Koren L, Romero R, Wagner GP (2018)
